LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-10-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JOANNE ECKARDT, AND PHH MORTGAGE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH A MODIFICATION ONLY AS TO THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE (PARTIES INFORMED BY EMAIL OF DATE CHANGE). MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 AT 9:30 A.M. ON NOVEMBER 28, 2022. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL REAL PROPERTY CASES PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. THE PARTIES ARE INSTRUCTED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES TO DEPARTMENT 501 BY NOVEMBER 18 WITH COVER LETTERS REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
